artifacts.role: WPHX PHP compiler segment_plans emission metadata implementation

claims: WPHX PHP emission manifests include structured segment_plans metadata for the existing generated admin-style and nested template segment shell adapters.
The focused runners assert compiler-emitted original path, adapter, adoption mode, segment order, caller-scope facts, include semantics, observable effects, and unsupported=[] for those plans.
Generated PHP behavior remains oracle/candidate identical and public-shell snapshot coverage remains at 11 cases.
non_claims: This does not claim generated ownership of existing WordPress mixed PHP/HTML files.
This does not claim broad theme, admin, feed, or block template ownership.
This does not claim HHX/HXX parity for existing Core templates.
This does not claim arbitrary Haxe expression lowering into PHP caller scope.
This does not claim a full PHP template backend or whole-file ownership for any WordPress file.
